pre-pump-radar.headline: MU dominates AI semiconductor momentum with 167.7 combined score in red-hot CHAT theme; CDNS and PANW offer higher RR quality in software plays with cleaner 1:5 and 1:3 structures.

signal-board.headline: Neutral with defensive undertones: equities face valuation headwinds while macro softens and crypto signals distress.

risk-desk.headline: Calm baseline with liquidity headwind: global tide receding while concentration risk builds.

liquidity.headline: Abundant liquidity regime: Strong dollar at 119.29 strains offshore funding; domestic stress metrics deeply subdued.

fundamentals.headline: AI and semiconductor momentum dominates the reflation regime, with MU as the primary conviction pick benefiting from 3x theme multiplier and $803M in 21-day ETF inflows, though valuation fundamentals require scrutiny.

crisis.headline: DEFCON 4 NORMAL (score 33.4): Global liquidity tide elevated at 70, auction plumbing stress at 35.2, credit spreads at 50—all stable, no acute trigger.

signals.headline: Weak signal week: 0 of 9 cascade calls hit in 7d, all FLAT outcomes; composite neutral at 0.0 across 42 live engines.

portfolio.headline: 15 fresh ALERT_TIER positions all day-old; 2 stops approached (AAPL -2.82%, MS -1.85%), MU lagging at -2.69%; net portfolio P&L near-flat at +$35.7; heavy tech/semicon concentration demands immediate calibration.

13f.headline: Berkshire Hathaway leads accumulation in AAPL, AXP, KO; smart money broadly adds consumer/financials; insider CEOs show high conviction in SLMT and COE despite distress signals.

screener.headline: AI semis and cybersecurity lead with 8 CASCADE_ALERT names; MU dominates on theme acceleration (89%) and $803M 21d inflow into CHAT ETF.
